nodes.title: Possible solutions to a problem are limited by available materials and resour...
nodes.description: Possible solutions to a problem are limited by available materials and resources (constraints). The success of a designed solution is determined by considering the desired features of a solution (criteria). Different proposals for solutions can be compared on the basis of how well each one meets the specified criteria for success or how well each takes the constraints into account.

nodes.title: A variety of hazards result from natural processes (e
nodes.description: A variety of hazards result from natural processes (e.g., earthquakes, tsunamis, volcanic eruptions). Humans cannot eliminate the hazards but can take steps to reduce their impacts.

academic_standards.description: A variety of hazards result from natural processes (e.g., earthquakes, tsunamis, volcanic eruptions). Humans cannot eliminate the hazards but can take steps to reduce their impacts.

nodes.title: Energy and fuels that humans use are derived from natural sources, and their ...
nodes.description: Energy and fuels that humans use are derived from natural sources, and their use affects the environment in multiple ways. Some resources are renewable over time, and others are not.

academic_standards.description: Energy and fuels that humans use are derived from natural sources, and their use affects the environment in multiple ways. Some resources are renewable over time, and others are not.

nodes.title: Living things affect the physical characteristics of their regions
nodes.description: Living things affect the physical characteristics of their regions.

academic_standards.description: Living things affect the physical characteristics of their regions.

nodes.title: The locations of mountain ranges, deep ocean trenches, ocean floor structures...
nodes.description: The locations of mountain ranges, deep ocean trenches, ocean floor structures, earthquakes, and volcanoes occur in patterns. Most earthquakes and volcanoes occur in bands that are often along the boundaries between continents and oceans. Major mountain chains form inside continents or near their edges. Maps can help locate the different land and water features areas of Earth.

academic_standards.description: The locations of mountain ranges, deep ocean trenches, ocean floor structures, earthquakes, and volcanoes occur in patterns. Most earthquakes and volcanoes occur in bands that are often along the boundaries between continents and oceans. Major mountain chains form inside continents or near their edges. Maps can help locate the different land and water features areas of Earth.

nodes.title: Rainfall helps to shape the land and affects the types of living things found...
nodes.description: Rainfall helps to shape the land and affects the types of living things found in a region. Water, ice, wind, living organisms, and gravity break rocks, soils, and sediments into smaller particles and move them around.

academic_standards.description: Rainfall helps to shape the land and affects the types of living things found in a region. Water, ice, wind, living organisms, and gravity break rocks, soils, and sediments into smaller particles and move them around.

nodes.title: Local, regional, and global patterns of rock formations reveal changes over t...
nodes.description: Local, regional, and global patterns of rock formations reveal changes over time due to earth forces, such as earthquakes. The presence and location of certain fossil types indicate the order in which rock layers were formed.

academic_standards.description: Local, regional, and global patterns of rock formations reveal changes over time due to earth forces, such as earthquakes. The presence and location of certain fossil types indicate the order in which rock layers were formed.

nodes.title: Different sense receptors are specialized for particular kinds of information...
nodes.description: Different sense receptors are specialized for particular kinds of information, which may be then processed by the animal's brain. Animals are able to use their perceptions and memories to guide their actions.

academic_standards.description: Different sense receptors are specialized for particular kinds of information, which may be then processed by the animal's brain. Animals are able to use their perceptions and memories to guide their actions.

nodes.title: Plants and animals have both internal and external structures that serve vari...
nodes.description: Plants and animals have both internal and external structures that serve various functions in growth, survival, behavior, and reproduction.

academic_standards.description: Plants and animals have both internal and external structures that serve various functions in growth, survival, behavior, and reproduction.

nodes.title: Digitized information can be transmitted over long distances without signific...
nodes.description: Digitized information can be transmitted over long distances without significant degradation. High-tech devices, such as computers or cell phones, can receive and decode information—convert it from digitized form to voice—and vice versa.

academic_standards.description: Digitized information can be transmitted over long distances without significant degradation. High-tech devices, such as computers or cell phones, can receive and decode information—convert it from digitized form to voice—and vice versa.

nodes.title: An object can be seen when light reflected from its surface enters the eyes
nodes.description: An object can be seen when light reflected from its surface enters the eyes.

academic_standards.description: An object can be seen when light reflected from its surface enters the eyes.

nodes.title: Waves of the same type can differ in amplitude (height of the wave) and wavel...
nodes.description: Waves of the same type can differ in amplitude (height of the wave) and wavelength (spacing between wave peaks).

academic_standards.description: Waves of the same type can differ in amplitude (height of the wave) and wavelength (spacing between wave peaks).

nodes.title: Waves, which are regular patterns of motion, can be made in water by disturbi...
nodes.description: Waves, which are regular patterns of motion, can be made in water by disturbing the surface. When waves move across the surface of deep water, the water goes up and down in place; there is no net motion in the direction of the wave except when the water meets a beach. (Note: This grade band endpoint was moved from K–2.)

academic_standards.description: Waves, which are regular patterns of motion, can be made in water by disturbing the surface. When waves move across the surface of deep water, the water goes up and down in place; there is no net motion in the direction of the wave except when the water meets a beach. (Note: This grade band endpoint was moved from K–2.)

nodes.title: The expression "produce energy" typically refers to the conversion of stored ...
nodes.description: The expression "produce energy" typically refers to the conversion of stored energy into a desired form for practical use.

academic_standards.description: The expression "produce energy" typically refers to the conversion of stored energy into a desired form for practical use.

nodes.title: When objects collide, the contact forces transfer energy so as to change the ...
nodes.description: When objects collide, the contact forces transfer energy so as to change the objects' motions.

academic_standards.description: When objects collide, the contact forces transfer energy so as to change the objects' motions.

nodes.title: Energy can also be transferred from place to place by electric currents, whic...
nodes.description: Energy can also be transferred from place to place by electric currents, which can then be used locally to produce motion, sound, heat, or light. The currents may have been produced to begin with by transforming the energy of motion into electrical energy.

academic_standards.description: Energy can also be transferred from place to place by electric currents, which can then be used locally to produce motion, sound, heat, or light. The currents may have been produced to begin with by transforming the energy of motion into electrical energy.

nodes.title: Light also transfers energy from place to place
nodes.description: Light also transfers energy from place to place.

academic_standards.description: Light also transfers energy from place to place.

nodes.title: Energy is present whenever there are moving objects, sound, light, or heat
nodes.description: Energy is present whenever there are moving objects, sound, light, or heat. When objects collide, energy can be transferred from one object to another, thereby changing their motion. In such collisions, some energy is typically also transferred to the surrounding air; as a result, the air gets heated and sound is produced.

academic_standards.description: Energy is present whenever there are moving objects, sound, light, or heat. When objects collide, energy can be transferred from one object to another, thereby changing their motion. In such collisions, some energy is typically also transferred to the surrounding air; as a result, the air gets heated and sound is produced.

nodes.title: Energy can be moved from place to place by moving objects or through sound, l...
nodes.description: Energy can be moved from place to place by moving objects or through sound, light, or electric currents.

nodes.title: The faster a given object is moving, the more energy it possesses
